shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src test* 2>/dev/null | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "downshift useCombobox getItemProps onMouseDown focus flicker preventDownshiftDefault" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '220,390p' src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js && sed -n '470,550p' src/hooks/useSelect/index.js && rg -n \"function callAllEventHandlers|const callAllEventHandlers\" src/utils.js && sed -n '500,545p' src/utils.js && rg -n \"mousedown|focus\" src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '80,110p' src/utils.js; sed -n '1,125p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js; sed -n '240,430p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js; cat package.json"

/bin/bash -lc "git log --all --oneline -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | head -20 && git remote -v && sed -n '110,190p' src/hooks/useCombobox/testUtils.js && sed -n '1,180p' src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js"

/bin/bash -lc 'npx kcd-scripts test --no-watch src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js'
/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && nl -ba src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js | sed -n '258,340p' && nl -ba src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js | sed -n '95,160p;258,290p'"

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && apply_patch <<'"'PATCH'
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/user/.mempal-notes/downshift-combobox-item-mousedown.md
+# Preserve combobox input focus during item selection
+
+Native "'`mousedown` on a combobox item transfers focus before the later click handler can select the item. The item prop getter should compose a consumer `onMouseDown` with Downshift'"'s handler, call "'`preventDefault()` in Downshift'"'s handler, and let "'`preventDownshiftDefault` opt out through the shared event utility.
*** End Patch
PATCH
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals && git diff --check && git status --short'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
